title: Address Copilot review on PR #1155
description:
Steps to reproduce:
1. 

Expected: 
Actual: 

PR: feat(ci): dynamic test duration tracking for pytest-split
https://github.com/openwpm/OpenWPM/pull/1155

## Unresolved Copilot review threads

- `test/conftest.py:32`

  `GROUP` is used directly to construct an output filename. Even though this is intended for CI, it’s still an environment-provided string and can contain path separators (e.g., `../`) or other unexpected characters that redirect writes outside the repo. Consider sanitizing `group` to an allowed set (e.g., digits only or a conservative regex like `^[A-Za-z0-9_-]+$`) before using it in the filename; otherwise skip writing and/or log a brief warning.

- `.github/workflows/run-tests.yaml:44`

  The restore key hard-codes `refs/heads/master`, but the repo appears to use `main` (diff base shows `index main..branch`). This will prevent cache reuse on the default branch if it’s actually `main`. Prefer using the default branch dynamically (e.g., `github.event.repository.default_branch`) or update the fallback to `refs/heads/main-`.
  ```suggestion
              test-durations-refs/heads/${{ github.event.repository.default_branch }}-
  ```

---

VERIFY each claim before acting — Copilot is fallible (it once flagged a valid os.getenv(key, default=...) as a bug). If real -> fix + resolve the thread. If wrong -> post a reasoned rebuttal + resolve. Builder -> the-hater -> done; never blindly apply.
